info.description: Candidate lifecycle, enrollment, exam access, and session management service.
info.title: Veritas Candidate Service API

post.description: Exchange the opaque invitation code (from the URL query param) for a JWT. JWT is in the response body only.
Validate exam access token before session start.

get.description: List candidate profiles for the caller enterprise with

parameters.description: Enterprise ID (fallback if middleware context is absent)
parameters.name: X-Enterprise-Id

post.description: Create one candidate profile under the caller enterprise.

parameters.description: Enterprise ID (fallback if middleware context is absent)
parameters.name: X-Enterprise-Id

post.description:
Create many candidate profiles from a CSV file (max 5MB).
The CSV should have the following columns in order:
external_id (required), first_name (required), last_name (required), email (optional).
The first row is expected to be a header and will be skipped.

parameters.description: Enterprise ID (fallback if middleware context is absent)
parameters.name: X-Enterprise-Id

get.description: Get one candidate profile by ID for the caller enterprise.

parameters.description: Enterprise ID (fallback if middleware context is absent)
parameters.name: X-Enterprise-Id

delete.description: Permanently delete a candidate profile by ID and all associated enrollments/sessions.

parameters.description: Enterprise ID (fallback if middleware context is absent)
parameters.name: X-Enterprise-Id

patch.description: Update candidate profile fields by ID.

parameters.description: Enterprise ID (fallback if middleware context is absent)
parameters.name: X-Enterprise-Id

patch.description: Activate a candidate profile by ID.

parameters.description: Enterprise ID (fallback if middleware context is absent)
parameters.name: X-Enterprise-Id

patch.description: Soft-deactivate a candidate profile by ID.

parameters.description: Enterprise ID (fallback if middleware context is absent)
parameters.name: X-Enterprise-Id

delete.description: Delete an enrollment. Only allowed if status is Pending.

get.description: Generate a fresh invitation URL (opaque code) for manual distribution. Old URL is invalidated.

post.description: Send or resend an invitation email to one candidate enrollment.
Reset attempts_used to zero for an enrollment.

patch.description: Revoke an enrollment. Any outstanding invitation link is immediately invalidated.

get.description: List exam enrollments for the caller enterprise with

post.description: Create enrollments for an exam. Returns per-candidate invitation URLs (opaque code, not JWT).
Send invitation emails to enrolled candidates. Admin-triggered; no emails are sent automatically on enroll.

parameters.description: Optional list of enrollment IDs to notify
parameters.name: body

get.description: List sessions for an exam. Optional query filters: status and candidateId.

parameters.description: Enterprise ID (fallback if middleware context is absent)
parameters.name: X-Enterprise-Id

get.description: List all submissions for an exam under the caller enterprise with

parameters.description: Enterprise ID (fallback if middleware context is absent)
parameters.name: X-Enterprise-Id

get.description: Returns a simple JSON indicating the service is alive.
Internal endpoint — returns the aggregated grading data for a session.
Return the active session for the authenticated candidate.

post.description:
Create and initialize a candidate exam session with face registration.
The face_image must be a JPEG, PNG, or WEBP file, maximum 5MB.

get.description: Get session details for a candidate/admin context.
Return answers saved by the authenticated candidate for a session.

put.description:
Upsert multiple question answers in a single request. Returns 207 with per-item results.
Items that fail validation or cannot be persisted are reported individually; successfully saved items are not affected by others failing.
Maximum 100 items per request.

patch.description: Save or update one question answer in a session. One of the two fields in the answer data must be non null. Both fields being non null or null is not allowed.

post.description: Force-expire a session by enterprise/admin action.

get.description: Get question snapshots for a candidate session.

post.description: Submit candidate exam session and create a submission record.

get.description: Get one session summary by session ID.

parameters.description: Enterprise ID (fallback if middleware context is absent)
parameters.name: X-Enterprise-Id

post.description: Terminate a session on enterprise/admin action.

get.description: Get submission detail by submission ID.

parameters.description: Enterprise ID (fallback if middleware context is absent)
parameters.name: X-Enterprise-Id

x-enum-comments.StatusPending: enrolled, admin has not yet sent notification
x-enum-comments.StatusStarted: candidate has an active exam session

x-enum-descriptions: enrolled, admin has not yet sent notification
candidate has an active exam session

enrollmentIds.description: EnrollmentIDs is optional; if empty, all Pending/Invited enrollments for the exam are notified.
